hooks.command: jq -r '(.tool_input.file_path // "") as $fp | (.tool_input.content // .tool_input.new_string // "") as $text | if ($fp | test("\\.zig$")) and ($text | test("catch ")) then {"decision":"block","reason":"Use `try` to propagate errors. The `catch` keyword is forbidden in this project — all errors must bubble up. See CLAUDE.md golden rules. Ask Dzara if you believe a catch is genuinely needed."} else empty end'
